Subject: Welcome To ZOCA 💜\n\nBody: Dear Deyett, I hope this message finds you well! I'm thrilled to support you as you begin your journey with Zoca. Our platform's AI-first approach and seamless functionality are design…

Hello. Hello. Hey, Dad. How are you doing? Fine. So, yeah. Hi, this is Sid from Zoka. I just saw your message on the Zoka app chat that you would like to cancel the services. May I ask you the reason? Yeah. Yeah. May I k…
I completely understand your frustration and I’m so sorry for the delay in the follow-up call. 🙏  Let’s get on the call as soon as someone’s available.
Let me check with my team and get back to you on this
Hi Deyett.

Okay
Ok
Since it's Halloween today, we have limited people working today.  Let me check
